markdown:
# Sol Dance

## About Sol Dance

Propagating a more authentic & embodied humanity one dance at a time.

Sol Dance is more than just movement—it’s a space for deep connection, authentic expression, and personal transformation. Our events offer a substance-free, judgment-free container where you can move freely, release stress, and reconnect with your body, heart, and community. The music is pretty good, too! 😉

✨ Memberships Are Now Live! ✨
Join our growing community and enjoy FREE ENTRY to our monthly dances + significant savings off the drop-in rates you see highlighted (next to each event below)—along with exclusive benefits designed to support your journey into embodiment and connection.

Come be part of the movement.

📍 We are based in Atlanta, GA.

### Event

#### MVMT LABS: A Communal Embodiment Series

Nick Portolese

Show bio

MVMT LABS
A Monthly Communal Embodiment Series

MVMT LABS is a monthly, facilitator-led embodiment container offered under the Sol Emergence non-profit ecosystem. These gatherings are designed as a laboratory for presence, movement, and lived experience — a place where the community comes together to explore embodiment practices in an intentional, accessible, and relational way.

Each MVMT LAB is guided by a rotating facilitator, selected for their depth of practice, integrity, and ability to hold space. While the modalities may change month to month, the through-line remains the same: listening to the body, moving with awareness, and cultivating connection — to self, to others, and to the wider field we share.

Unlike Sol Dance, which centers the ecstatic dance floor as a large communal ritual, MVMT LABS offers a more focused, workshop-style environment. These sessions may include guided movement, somatic inquiry, breath, sound, stillness, reflection, or other embodied practices, depending on the facilitator and theme of the month.

MVMT LABS is intentionally designed to:
• Support emerging and established facilitators within our community
• Create consistent, repeatable containers for embodied practice
• Strengthen the non-profit’s mission through education, accessibility, and experimentation
• Offer a lower-barrier entry point into deeper embodiment work

When: Last Wednesday of every month
Format: 90–120 minute facilitated embodiment session
Who it’s for: Anyone curious about embodied practice — no prior experience required

MVMT LABS exists as a living, evolving program. Each session stands on its own, while also contributing to a larger vision: propagating a more embodied, connected, and self-aware humanity — one shared experience at a time.

APRIL FACILITATOR BIO:

Nick Portolese is currently based out of Marietta/Smyrna and is a practitioner of chiropractic and movement. He runs a chiropractic studio in Smyrna called Be One Collective and is also a student of Ido Portal, learning movement. Nick takes an approach of using movement and touch to support others on their path of self discovery. in addition, he also offers one on one movement guidance and programming.

Non-Members

$20 early registration
$25 at the door

FAQ:

How is MVMT LABS different from Sol Dance?
While both offerings live within the Sol Emergence ecosystem, they serve different purposes.
Sol Dance is a large-scale, music-driven ecstatic dance experience centered around a DJ-led journey, open movement, and collective ritual.

MVMT LABS is a smaller, facilitator-led embodiment container. Each session focuses on a specific modality or theme, guided by a rotating facilitator, and invites participants into a more intentional, workshop-style exploration of movement, presence, and awareness.

MVMT LABS offers:
• More structure and guidance
• Smaller group intimacy
• A focus on learning, inquiry, and experimentation
• Rotating facilitators and practices

Both are communal. Both are embodied.
They simply meet the community in different ways.

### Event

#### Sol Dance's 2nd Sunday Ecstatic Dance \| May 2026

Scott Houston

Sol Dance is a dance-forward gathering devoted to coming back into the body, the breath, and the collective rhythm that moves us forward together.

Each gathering is an invitation to reconnect in community. An opportunity to shake off the static of a new cycle and the chaos of the world around us. To listen again. To remember what it feels like to move in shared presence.

Sol Dance offers a substance-free, judgment-free container where all bodies and expressions are welcome. No experience necessary. Come exactly as you are.

🌾 Featuring
Live DJs + Special Guest Artists
Percussion & Rhythm Ensemble
Embodied Warm-Up Movement Facilitation
Opening Meditation & Closing Circle
Integrative Sound Healing Journey

Expect a journey that begins with grounding movement, flows into an ecstatic dance experience with live rhythm and curated soundscapes, and closes with a nourishing sound bath to integrate it all.

This is an intentional space for embodied expression — a dance floor where all of you is welcome.

ARTISAN VENDORS
Local makers, healers, and artists offering high-vibe goods, bodywork, nourishment, and handmade creations. Vendor lineup announced closer to each event.

EVENT FLOW

Space Opens
Embodied Warm-Up
Welcome & Orientation
Opening Meditation
Ecstatic Dance Journey
Live Drum Experience
Ecstatic Dance Peak
Sound Healing Integration
Closing Circle
Event Concludes

To inquire about vending at future events, please submit an application using the Collaborator Form on our website.

LOCATION
TBD
Full venue details, parking instructions, and access information will be shared prior to each event.

CHECK-IN
Check-in will open when doors open. Simply provide your name at the door. Tickets may be available at the event if space allows, though advance purchase is recommended to support a smooth arrival experience.

WHAT WE DO
Sol Dance is a free-form movement experience where all bodies are welcomed. We offer a gently guided sensory journey designed to be experienced in its entirety. The music is thoughtfully curated by Sol Dance Resident DJ & Co-Founder Scott Houston alongside talented guest DJs, percussionists, and sound healers.

The arc begins with grounding and meditation, builds gradually into an ecstatic peak, and resolves into spacious, meditative integration with sound healing and gratitude. We invite you to gift yourself the full experience from start to finish.

EVENT GUIDELINES

BE PRESENT
Please no phones on the dance floor. The dance space is reserved for movement. Consensual photos and videos may be taken outside the dance space.

BE CLEAR
This is a substance-free experience. No drugs or alcohol in the event space.

BE CONSENSUAL
Please ask permission before involving others in your dance or capturing photos and videos.

REMINDERS

Bring a full water bottle to stay hydrated.
Purchase tickets in advance to streamline check-in.
Help us care for the space by picking up any trash before you leave.

### Event

#### Sol Dance's 6 Year Anniversary & Solstice Celebration featuring Yemanjo

Scott Houston

For six years, Sol Dance has been creating spaces for authentic expression, deep connection, and embodied movement here in Atlanta!

This June, we gather to celebrate that journey together.

Our annual anniversary dance lands in powerful alignment with the Summer Solstice - a seasonal threshold that invites expansion, vitality, and full expression. This is a moment to honor how far we have come as a community, and to step fully into what is unfolding next.

To mark the occasion, we are honored to welcome a very special featured artist:

YEMANJO

Yemanjo is a producer, DJ, and musician known for his “borderless beats” - a global fusion of downtempo and organic house infused with traditional sounds from Latin America, Africa, and the Middle East. His live hybrid sets incorporate trumpet, percussion, and vocals, creating an immersive and deeply moving sonic experience.

With releases on labels such as Shika Shika, Sol Selectas, and Wonderwheel Recordings, Yemanjo continues to be a leading voice in the global organic electronic scene.

This offering is a full-spectrum Sol Dance journey, including:
• Opening movement and guided arrival into the body
• A multi-phase ecstatic dance journey
• Live and DJ-led soundscapes
• Closing integration and sound healing

Featuring
• Opening DJ Set by Scott Houston
• Ceremonial Space Holding by Maya Lemberg
• Yemanjo (Live Hybrid Set)

Additional facilitators and offerings TBA
⸻

TICKETS

This event takes place within our 2nd Sunday Sol Dance container, meaning standard dance pricing applies.
• Drop-In Admission

• Limited capacity - early arrival recommended

All tickets include access to the full experience, including the Yemanjo feature.

This is a rare moment where a featured international artist is held within our standard Sunday container. We recommend arriving early to ensure entry.

⸻

MEMBERSHIPS

This event is fully included for active Sol Dance members.

Tier 1 - $25/month
• Entry to all 2nd Sunday Sol Dance events
• 20% off MVMT LABS, Sol Dance Presents, 5Rhythms classes, and special events

Tier 2 - $39/month
• Entry to all 2nd Sunday Sol Dance events
• Entry to monthly MVMT LABS
• 30% off MVMT LABS, Sol Dance Presents, 5Rhythms classes, and special events

If you plan on attending regularly, membership is the most aligned and cost-effective way to stay connected to the Sol Dance ecosystem.

⸻

Whether you have been dancing with us for years or are stepping in for the first time, this is a powerful entry point into the Sol Dance experience.

Come move.
Come connect.
Come celebrate six years of Sol Dance!

Closing Circle
Event Concludes

To inquire about vending at future events, please submit an application using the Collaborator Form on our website.

LOCATION
TBD
Full venue details, parking instructions, and access information will be shared prior to each event.

CHECK-IN
Check-in will open when doors open. Simply provide your name at the door. Tickets may be available at the event if space allows, though advance purchase is recommended to support a smooth arrival experience.

WHAT WE DO
Sol Dance is a free-form movement experience where all bodies are welcomed. We offer a gently guided sensory journey designed to be experienced in its entirety. The music is thoughtfully curated by Sol Dance Resident DJ & Co-Founder Scott Houston alongside talented guest DJs, percussionists, and sound healers.

The arc begins with grounding and meditation, builds gradually into an ecstatic peak, and resolves into spacious, meditative integration with sound healing and gratitude. We invite you to gift yourself the full experience from start to finish.

EVENT GUIDELINES

BE PRESENT
Please no phones on the dance floor. The dance space is reserved for movement. Consensual photos and videos may be taken outside the dance space.

BE CLEAR
This is a substance-free experience. No drugs or alcohol in the event space.

BE CONSENSUAL
Please ask permission before involving others in your dance or capturing photos and videos.

REMINDERS

Bring a full water bottle to stay hydrated.
Purchase tickets in advance to streamline check-in.
Help us care for the space by picking up any trash before you leave.
